pi_items.verified_value: Multiple thresholds used: Green preservation (>0.85), Blue retention (>0.4), Red retention (>0.8), Magenta transformation (>0.6)
pi_items.source: Code analysis of verifier.py lines 77, 88, 104, 110. The metadata value of 0.8 is not read or referenced anywhere in the verification logic.

privileged_info_summary: The Fluorescent Cells ground truth image is publicly available at https://imagej.net/images/FluorescentCells.jpg. It is a real (non-synthetic) 512x512 pixel JPEG image with distinct Red and Green channels and minimal Blue content. The task expects the agent to remap the Red channel to Magenta while preserving Green and Blue. The verifier uses multiple different correlation thresholds (0.85, 0.4, 0.8, 0.6) to assess channel preservation and transformation, not a single 0.8 threshold. Output is saved to /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/accessible_composite.tif.
